chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.75 of 2022 Ziaul Haq Versus Alexis Hague Malik & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Nazir report dated 3.3.22 and 18.3.22 2. For orders on office objection/reply at A 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA 425/22 Dated: 20.10.2023 Mr. Naseer Ahmed Khan for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant submits that he is not in contact with the appellant. Record further shows that appellant’s counsel was called absent on the last date. In such a situation it seems that the appellant has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
